headerDisplay: Homebridge plugin for Amazon Blink security cameras

pin.title: 2FA Verification Code
pin.description: Enter the 2FA verification code sent to your email/phone after the first auth attempt, then restart Homebridge

hide-alarm.title: Hide Alarm (Security System)
hide-alarm.description: When combined with the arm switch (used for automation), the Security System will have to be controlled by the Blink App.

hide-manual-arm-switch.title: Hide Sync Module Arm Switch
hide-manual-arm-switch.description: The Sync Module Arm switch allows for automations to arm / disarm all cameras associated with a sync module.

hide-privacy-switch.title: Hide Camera Privacy-Mode Enable/Disable Switch
hide-privacy-switch.description: Privacy-Mode prevents thumbnails from refreshing when the Security System is not armed. Disabling this switch will globally disable privacy-mode on all cameras.

hide-cameras.title: Hide Camera Accessories
hide-cameras.description: Removes cameras from HomeKit. Any associated automations/scenes will have to be recreated if you want them back later.

hide-doorbells.title: Hide Doorbell Accessories
hide-doorbells.description: Removes doorbells from HomeKit. Any associated automations/scenes will have to be recreated if you want them back later.

enable-liveview.title: Enable LiveView when clicking on a camera feed
enable-liveview.description: When enabled, clicking a camera feed will start a live stream relay. When disabled, only the last recorded thumbnail is shown.

lv-save.title: Save Live View Clips
lv-save.description: When enabled, Blink will save a clip for every live view session. When disabled (default), live view streams are not recorded. This controls the per-network 'Save all Live Views' setting on your Blink account.

disable-thumbnail-refresh.title: Disable thumbnail auto-refresh
disable-thumbnail-refresh.description: By default, the thumbnails of the cameras will refresh when the camera is enabled, disabling the auto refresh keeps the default thumbnail untouched.

camera-thumbnail-refresh-seconds.title: Camera Thumbnail Refresh (seconds)
camera-thumbnail-refresh-seconds.description: Minimum interval (seconds) between Blink cloud thumbnail refreshes per camera. Controls how often the plugin asks a camera to capture a new thumbnail — not how often HomeKit displays them. HomeKit's own snapshot polling (~10s while the Home app is foregrounded, ~60s backgrounded) is served from cache between refreshes. Default 3600. Ignored if auto refresh is disabled.

camera-status-polling-seconds.title: Status Polling (seconds)
camera-status-polling-seconds.description: Camera status does not update live and must be fetched periodically. By default this is done every 30 seconds.

camera-motion-polling-seconds.title: Camera Motion Polling (seconds)
camera-motion-polling-seconds.description: Camera motion detection does not update live and must be fetched periodically. By default this is done every 15 seconds.

enable-audio.title: Enable Audio in Live View
enable-audio.description: Enable one-way audio in HomeKit Live View. Requires Audio Streaming to also be enabled in the Blink app under Device Settings → Privacy.
